attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                  
 -6666,          
 'OPL' SS_CODE,  
 NSOLT.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
 NSOLT.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   , 
 NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,   
 NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,  
 CAST (coalesce(SXOLA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) AS DATE) START_SSP_DATE,                                                
 CAST(coalesce(SXOLA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00'  AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DATETIME,                   
 '3500-01-01' END_SSP_DATE  ,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END_TV_DATETIME,
 NULL AS DISPATCH_DTM, 
 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME, 
 NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,                                                         
 NULL  AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 NULL AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
 NULL AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                      /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                        
 '=' AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,        /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/
 NULL  AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      
 NULL  AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,       
 NULL  SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,     
 NULL AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM,              
 NULL  ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD,     
 NULL  SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,
 NULL BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/ 
 NULL AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,               /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/   
 '=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,            
 'UNKNOWN' AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM,                   /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/ 
 NULL SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT,    
 NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,     
 '=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG,       /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/       
 COALESCE (NSOL_TOP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY, 
 COALESCE (NSOL_CONFIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY, 
 '=' AS PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG,             /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/   
 -6666 AS RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY,  
 'N' AS EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,
 NULL AS RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,   
 'N'  CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,   
 SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,  
 NULL EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT, 
 'UNKWOWN' AS SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,            /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/   
 'N'  AS SHIPPABLE_ROLE,            
 NULL AS SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT,    /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/      
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS  DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
 cast (NULL as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,
 'UNKNOWN' SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, /* Changed as part of CE AUS Q3FY14 */ 
 COALESCE(SXOLA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,                    
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,       
 CASE WHEN NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE  ,
 /*-999  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY  */ /* Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes,August release,2014*/
 /* Modified  as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 COALESCE(NRCAL1.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY,    
 -999  AS PRICING_QTY , /*Added as part of EPS Data Subscription Qwin*/ 
  'UNKNOWN'  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
 NULL AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT,
 NULL AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT),-999)  AS SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
  COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) RETROSPECTIVE_CANCELLATION_DTM  , /*Added as q3FY21 Annuity release*/	 	 
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  DV_RETROSPEC_CANCELLATION_DT , 	 	 
  COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM, 0.000000) AS RETROSPEC_UNUSED_TERM_MONT_CNT,
  COALESCE(SXOLA.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE,
  COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT,/* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
  COALESCE(SXOLA.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG ,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_STATUS_CD,
  	
 COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER_NAME,
  COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM_NAME

  --COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
  --SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
 FROM
 /*(SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS  NULL) SXOLA   */
/*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
/* Modified as a part of SFP June  28th Rel*/
(SELECT SXOLA.*,SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL SXOLA 
  INNER JOIN ( select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL where (INTENDED_USE is NULL OR 
  upper(intended_use) <> 'NPI TEST') )SSO
 ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.HEADER_ID
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NULL)SXOLA
  /*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
  
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT NSOLT.*,COALESCE(NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLT.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLT WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999  )NSOLT 
 ON  NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.LINE_ID    
 AND NSOLT.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT  JOIN (SELECT NSOL_TOP.*,
 COALESCE(NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_TOP.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW 
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
 NSOL_TOP WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSOL_TOP
 ON  NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID 
 --AND NSOL_TOP.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT  JOIN 
(SELECT NSOL_CONFIG.*,(COALESCE(NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CONFIG.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT))
 SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_CONFIG WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOL_CONFIG
 ON  (NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= (case when SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN = 'B2B-COMMERCE' then CAST(SXOLA.TOPMODEL_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT) else SXOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID  end)
 /*LINK_TO_LINE_ID Join Change For GROGU */       
 --AND NSOL_CONFIG.SS_CODE='OPL'
 )
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
 ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID 
 LEFT JOIN
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT          
 ON
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NSOLVT.SS_CODE='OPL'
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
 ON SXOLA.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
 WHERE SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM'

SELECT                                                                                                                                  
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                               
 -6666,                                                                                                                                             
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                                                                                    
 NSOLT.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,                                                                                                                                           
 NSOLT.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   ,                                                                                                                                       
 NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,                                                                                                                                       
 NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,                                                                                                                                 
 CAST (coalesce(SXOLA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) AS DATE) START_SSP_DATE,                                                                           
 CAST(coalesce(SXOLA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00'  AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DATETIME,                   
 '3500-01-01' END_SSP_DATE  ,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END_TV_DATETIME,                                                                                                                       
 NULL AS DISPATCH_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME,                                                                                                                                           
 NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,                                                                                                      
 NULL  AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,                                                                                                                                               
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,                                                                                                                                     
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,                                                                                                                                    
 NULL AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                                                                                                                                         
 NULL AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                      /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                         
 '=' AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,        /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
 NULL  AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                          
 NULL  AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                              
 NULL  SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                      
 NULL AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
 NULL  ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD,                                                                                                                                         
 NULL  SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,                                                                                                                                 
 NULL BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
 NULL AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,               /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
 '=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,                                                                                                                                  
 'UNKNOWN' AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,                                                                                                                                    
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM,                   /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                      
 NULL SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT,                                                                                                                                          
 NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,                                                                                                                                     
 '=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG,       /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                      
 COALESCE (NSOL_TOP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                            
 COALESCE (NSOL_CONFIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
 '=' AS PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG,             /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
 -6666 AS RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
 'N' AS EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,                                                                                                                                           
 NULL AS RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,                                                                                                                                    
 'N'  CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,                                                                                                                                        
 SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,                                                                                                                                              
 NULL EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT,                                                                                                                                     
 'UNKWOWN' AS SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,            /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                                      
 'N'  AS SHIPPABLE_ROLE,                                                                                                                                                
 NULL AS SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT,    /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/      
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS  DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
 cast (NULL as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,
 'UNKNOWN' SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, /* Changed as part of CE AUS Q3FY14 */ 
 COALESCE(SXOLA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,                                                                                                                                                
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,                                                                                                                                      
 CASE WHEN NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT>0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
/*-999  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY  */  /* Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes,August release,2014*/
/* Modified as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 COALESCE(NRCAL1.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY,    
 -999  AS PRICING_QTY , /*Added as part of EPS Data Subscription Qwin*/ 
  'UNKNOWN'  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
 NULL AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT,
 NULL AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT),-999)  AS SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM, /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
   COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) RETROSPECTIVE_CANCELLATION_DTM  , /*Added as q3FY21 Annuity release*/	 	 
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  DV_RETROSPEC_CANCELLATION_DT , 	 	 
  COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM, 0.000000) AS RETROSPEC_UNUSED_TERM_MONT_CNT,
  COALESCE(SXOLA.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE,
  COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT,/* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */ 
  --COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
  --SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
 COALESCE(SXOLA.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG ,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_STATUS_CD,
  COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER_NAME,
 
  COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM_NAME
	

 FROM 
 --(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL) SXOLA    
/*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
/* Modified as a part of SFP June  28th Rel*/
(SELECT SXOLA.*,SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL SXOLA 
  INNER JOIN ( select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL where (INTENDED_USE is NULL OR 
  upper(intended_use) <> 'NPI TEST') )SSO
 ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.HEADER_ID
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL)SXOLA
  /*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT  COALESCE(NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLT.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW,
 NSOLT.* FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOLT  WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999)NSOLT 
 ON NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.LINE_ID    
 LEFT  JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE(NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_TOP.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 ,NSOL_TOP.*
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_TOP WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999  ) NSOL_TOP
 ON  NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID
 LEFT  JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE(NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CONFIG.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 ,NSOL_CONFIG.*  
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_CONFIG WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOL_CONFIG
 ON  NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW = (case when SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN = 'B2B-COMMERCE' then CAST(SXOLA.TOPMODEL_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT) else SXOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID  end)
 /*LINK_TO_LINE_ID Join Change For GROGU */
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
 ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID 
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV WHERE SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT<>-6666)
 NSOLVT          
 ON
 NSOLVT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SXOLA.ERP_LINE_ID 
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
 ON SXOLA.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
 WHERE SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM'

SELECT 
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                  
  COALESCE(SXOLA.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-6666) AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
 'OPL' SS_CODE,  
  COALESCE(SXOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,-999) AS BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,

  COALESCE(SXOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,-999) AS BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   , 
 NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,   
 COALESCE(NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,-6666) AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,    
 CAST (SXOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) START_SSP_DATE,                                                
 SXOLA.CREATION_DATE START_TV_DATETIME,                   
 '3500-01-01' END_SSP_DATE  ,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END_TV_DATETIME,
 NULL AS DISPATCH_DTM, 
 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME, 
 NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,                                                         
 NULL  AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 NULL AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
 NULL AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                      /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                        
 '=' AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,        /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/
 NULL  AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      
 NULL  AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,       
 NULL  SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,     
 NULL AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM,              
 NULL  ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD,     
 NULL  SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,
 NULL BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/ 
 NULL AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,               /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/   
 '=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,            
  COALESCE(SXOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS  DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM,                   /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/ 
 NULL SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT,    
 NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,     
 '=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG,       /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/       
 COALESCE (NSOL_TOP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY, 
 COALESCE (NSOL_CONFIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY, 
 '=' AS PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG,             /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/   
 -6666 AS RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY,  
 'N' AS EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,
 NULL AS RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,   
 'N'  CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,   
 SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,  
 NULL EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT, 
 'UNKWOWN' AS SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,            /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/   
 'N'  AS SHIPPABLE_ROLE,            
 NULL AS SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT,    /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/      
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS  DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
 cast (NULL as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,
  /* CASE WHEN SXOLA.LINE_TYPE IN('HW') THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
   ELSE SXOLA.LINE_TYPE 
   END AS SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, */ /* Changed as part of CBM */ 
   
 CASE WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME = 'CBM Component Sales' THEN 'CompSales-PRD-US-L'
     WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME = 'CBM Replacement - $0' OR SXOLA.LINE_TYPE = 'HW' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
     ELSE COALESCE(SXOLA.LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
  END AS SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, /* CBM LINE_TYPE Change */ 
    
 COALESCE(SXOLA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,                    
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,       
 CASE WHEN NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE  ,
 /*-999  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY  */ /* Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes,August release,2014*/
 /* Modified  as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 COALESCE(NRCAL1.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY,    
 COALESCE(SXOLA.PRICING_QTY_TO,0) AS PRICING_QTY ,/*Added as part of EPS Data Subscription Qwin*/ 
  'UNKNOWN'  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
 NULL AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT,
 NULL AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT),-999)  AS SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
 COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) RETROSPECTIVE_CANCELLATION_DTM  , /*Added as q3FY21 Annuity release*/	 	 
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  DV_RETROSPEC_CANCELLATION_DT , 	 	 
 COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM, 0.000000) AS RETROSPEC_UNUSED_TERM_MONT_CNT,
 COALESCE(NCPU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_MFG_PO_OPRTNG_UNIT_NAME_CD ,/*ADDED AS PART OF CBM MAY REL*/
 COALESCE(SXOLA.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE,
 COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT,/* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */ 
 --COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
 --SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
 COALESCE(SXOLA.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG ,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_STATUS_CD
 FROM
 /*(SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS  NULL) SXOLA   */
/*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
/* Modified as a part of SFP June  28th Rel*/
(SELECT SXOLA.*,SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL SXOLA 
  INNER JOIN ( select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL where (INTENDED_USE is NULL OR 
  upper(intended_use) <> 'NPI TEST') )SSO
 ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.HEADER_ID
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NULL)SXOLA
  /*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
  
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT NSOLT.*,COALESCE(NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLT.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLT WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999  )NSOLT 
 ON  NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.LINE_ID    
 AND NSOLT.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT  JOIN (SELECT NSOL_TOP.*,
 COALESCE(NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_TOP.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW 
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
 NSOL_TOP WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSOL_TOP
 ON  NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID 
 --AND NSOL_TOP.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT  JOIN 
(SELECT NSOL_CONFIG.*,(COALESCE(NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CONFIG.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT))
 SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_CONFIG WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOL_CONFIG
 ON  (NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= SXOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID       
 --AND NSOL_CONFIG.SS_CODE='OPL'
 )
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
 ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID 
 LEFT JOIN
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT          
 ON
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NSOLVT.SS_CODE='OPL'
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
 ON SXOLA.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO /* CBM LINE_TYPE Change */
 ON NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 /*ADDED AS PART OF CBM  MAY REL */
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT  NCPU
 ON SXOLA.MFG_PO_ORG_ID = NCPU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
 WHERE SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM')

SELECT                                                                                                                                  
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                               
COALESCE(SXOLA.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-6666) AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,                                                                                                                                          
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                                                                                    
 COALESCE(SXOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,-999) AS BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
  COALESCE(SXOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,-999) AS BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   , 
                                                                                                                                     
 NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,                                                                                                                                       
  COALESCE(NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,-6666) AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,                                                                                                                                 
 CAST (SXOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) START_SSP_DATE,                                                                           
 SXOLA.CREATION_DATE START_TV_DATETIME,                   
 '3500-01-01' END_SSP_DATE  ,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END_TV_DATETIME,                                                                                                                       
 NULL AS DISPATCH_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME,                                                                                                                                           
 NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,                                                                                                      
 NULL  AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,                                                                                                                                               
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                             
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,                                                                                                                                     
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,                                                                                                                                    
 NULL AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                                                                                                                                         
 NULL AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,                      /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                         
 '=' AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,        /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
 NULL  AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                          
 NULL  AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                              
 NULL  SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                      
 NULL AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM,                                                                                                                                            
 NULL  ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD,                                                                                                                                         
 NULL  SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,                                                                                                                                 
 NULL BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
 NULL AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,               /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                         
 '=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,                                                                                                                                  
  COALESCE(SXOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,                                                                                                                                   
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM,                   /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                      
 NULL SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT,                                                                                                                                          
 NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,                                                                                                                                     
 '=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG,       /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                      
 COALESCE (NSOL_TOP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY,                                                                                                                                            
 COALESCE (NSOL_CONFIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-6666) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
 '=' AS PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG,             /* Loaded from LINE_EXT*/                                                                                                                                         
 -6666 AS RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY,                                                                                                                                    
 'N' AS EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,                                                                                                                                           
 NULL AS RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,                                                                                                                                    
 'N'  CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,                                                                                                                                        
 SXOLA.INITIAL_TERM RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,                                                                                                                                              
 NULL EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT,                                                                                                                                     
 'UNKWOWN' AS SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,            /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/                                                                                                                                      
 'N'  AS SHIPPABLE_ROLE,                                                                                                                                                
 NULL AS SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT,    /* Loaded from LINES_EXT*/      
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS  DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' AS INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
 cast (NULL as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,
 /*CASE WHEN SXOLA.LINE_TYPE IN('HW') THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
   ELSE SXOLA.LINE_TYPE 
 END AS SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME,*/ /* Changed as part of CBM */ 
 
  CASE WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME = 'CBM Component Sales' THEN 'CompSales-PRD-US-L'
     WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME = 'CBM Replacement - $0' OR SXOLA.LINE_TYPE = 'HW' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
     ELSE COALESCE(SXOLA.LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
   END AS SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME, /* CBM LINE_TYPE Change */ 
  
 COALESCE(SXOLA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,                                                                                                                                                
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,                                                                                                                                      
 CASE WHEN NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT>0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
/*-999  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY  */  /* Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes,August release,2014*/
/* Modified as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 COALESCE(NRCAL1.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY,    
 COALESCE(SXOLA.PRICING_QTY_TO,0) AS PRICING_QTY , /*Added as part of EPS Data Subscription Qwin*/ 
  'UNKNOWN'  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
 NULL AS PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT,
 NULL AS ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER AS BIGINT),-999)  AS SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM, /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
  COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) RETROSPECTIVE_CANCELLATION_DTM  , /*Added as q3FY21 Annuity release*/	 	 
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOLA.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))  DV_RETROSPEC_CANCELLATION_DT , 	 	 
 COALESCE(SXOLA.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM, 0.000000) AS RETROSPEC_UNUSED_TERM_MONT_CNT,
 COALESCE(NCPU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_MFG_PO_OPRTNG_UNIT_NAME_CD, /*ADDED AS PART OF CBM MAY REL*/
 COALESCE(SXOLA.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE,
 COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT,/* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
 COALESCE(SXOLA.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG ,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_STATUS_CD,
 COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER_NAME,
 COALESCE(SXOLA. MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM, ELOL.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM,'UNKNOWN') RU_MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM_NAME

 --COALESCE(SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
 --SXOLA.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
 FROM 
 --(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL) SXOLA    
/*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
/* Modified as a part of SFP June  28th Rel*/
(SELECT SXOLA.*,SSO.RESELLER_BID,SSO.ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL SXOLA 
  INNER JOIN ( select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL where (INTENDED_USE is NULL OR 
  upper(intended_use) <> 'NPI TEST') )SSO
 ON SXOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.HEADER_ID
  WHERE ERP_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL)SXOLA
  /*aprilQ3fy19 change*/ 
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT  COALESCE(NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLT.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW,
 NSOLT.* FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOLT  WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999)NSOLT 
 ON NSOLT.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW=SXOLA.LINE_ID    
 LEFT  JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE(NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_TOP.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 ,NSOL_TOP.*
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_TOP WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999  ) NSOL_TOP
 ON  NSOL_TOP.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW= SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID
 LEFT  JOIN 
 (SELECT COALESCE(NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CONFIG.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT) SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW
 ,NSOL_CONFIG.*  
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSOL_CONFIG WHERE SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOL_CONFIG
 ON  NSOL_CONFIG.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT_NEW = SXOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOL
 ON SXOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = ELOL.LINE_ID 
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV WHERE SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT<>-6666)
 NSOLVT          
 ON
 NSOLVT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SXOLA.ERP_LINE_ID 
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
 ON SXOLA.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO /* CBM LINE_TYPE Change */
 ON NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  /*ADDED AS PART OF CBM  MAY REL */
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT  NCPU
 ON SXOLA.MFG_PO_ORG_ID = NCPU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
  WHERE SXOLA.ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM')
